issuer: Federal Reserve Board (National Information Center / RSSD database)
format: Sequential integer with check digit, no fixed length
scope: Every entity the Fed tracks (banks, BHCs/FHCs, branches, savings institutions, holding-company tiers, some foreign and non-bank entities)
reuse_rule: Never changes, never reused; one per entity for its entire life cycle; persists after liquidation or closure
primary_in: NIC/NPW, FFIEC Call Report, FR Y-9C and the FR Y-series
also_appears_in: FDIC datasets (FED_RSSD), FFIEC CDR, FRED bank series, academic bank panels, HMDA pre-2018 (agency code 2)
notes: Most stable join key across charter changes and over time; carries no inherent attribute info (ID_RSSD in NIC)

scope: Every FDIC-insured depository institution (banks and savings institutions)
reuse_rule: Unique per insured institution; assigned at insurance, retained through life; not recycled in practice
primary_in: FDIC BankFind / SDI / Summary of Deposits / failures lists
notes: Sequential-integer system - not globally unique without an agency qualifier; assigned per head-office depository

issuer: Office of the Comptroller of the Currency
scope: National banks and (since 2011-07-21) federal savings associations / federal thrifts
reuse_rule: Assigned at chartering and retained through life
notes: Since 2011-07-21 the OCC Charter field also stores national thrifts as thrift docket + 700000

format: Sequential integer; banded 1-59999 Federal, 60000-79999 Federally Insured State Chartered, 80000+ Non-Federally Insured
scope: Federally insured credit unions (and some non-federally-insured)
reuse_rule: Assigned at chartering and retained through life
notes: Sequential-integer system - not globally unique without an agency qualifier

issuer: GLEIF governs; issued by accredited Local Operating Units (LOUs) overseen by the LEI ROC
format: 20-char alphanumeric: chars 1-4 LOU prefix, 5-18 entity-unique, 19-20 MOD-97-10 checksum (ISO/IEC 7064)
scope: Any legal entity participating in financial transactions worldwide
reuse_rule: Permanently unique to one entity; never reused; must be renewed annually to stay active but the code persists
also_appears_in: SEC/CFTC swap reporting, FR Y-series LEI fields, GLEIF golden-copy file, NIC (ID_LEI attribute)
notes: ISO 17442; exists only from ~2012 forward - cannot back-fill pre-2012 panels (coverage gap)

issuer: American Bankers Association via its registrar (currently LexisNexis Risk Solutions; historically Accuity)
format: 9 digits FFFF AAAA C: Fed routing symbol (4) + ABA institution id (4) + MOD-10 check digit (1)
scope: Financial institutions eligible for a Federal Reserve master account (payment routing)
reuse_rule: Tied to payment routing not entity identity; reassignable/retirable after mergers; reusable across non-concurrent entities; one institution may hold many
primary_in: Fedwire/ACH routing files / FedACH / E-Payments Routing Directory
notes: Not an entity key - never use as a persistent entity identifier

issuer: (former) Office of Thrift Supervision - defunct since 2011-07-21
format: Numeric docket; NIC field 9 chars but only right-most 5 used
reuse_rule: Legacy identifier; OTS functions transferred to OCC/FDIC/Fed under Dodd-Frank
primary_in: Legacy thrift datasets / historical TFR (Thrift Financial Report) data
also_appears_in: NIC (ID_THRIFT, ID_THRIFT_HC attributes), HMDA pre-2018 (agency code 4, legacy)
notes: New thrift supervision uses OCC Charter / RSSD

scope: Any US entity with tax obligations
reuse_rule: Permanently assigned to a legal entity; not recycled to another entity
also_appears_in: SEC filings, HMDA pre-2018 fallback respondent id, NIC (ID_TAX attribute, eff. 2008-12-31)
notes: Multiple entities under one parent each have their own EIN

format: Integer, zero-padded to 10 digits in API paths
scope: Any EDGAR filer (companies including public BHCs, funds, individuals)
reuse_rule: Assigned at filer signup; unique to the filer and not recycled
primary_in: SEC EDGAR submissions / XBRL APIs and all SEC filings
notes: Independent of RSSD/CERT; joining public-BHC financials to regulatory data needs an external crosswalk

issuer: CUSIP Global Services (operated for the American Bankers Association)
scope: Securities (equity/debt) of issuers including public BHCs
reuse_rule: Identifies a security not the legal entity; reassignment governed by CGS rules
also_appears_in: SEC EDGAR full-text search (searchable field), NIC (ID_CUSIP attribute)
notes: Ticker symbols (issued by listing exchange NYSE/Nasdaq) can change/be reused across issuers - also not a stable entity key
